nodes.label: sanad-review-stats.png
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad app's Smart Review (المراجعة الذكية) panel within the Student Morning (صباح الطالب) view. Shows review session statistics, review mode selection, source filter options, and recent session history. App is a PWA for Saudi lawyers and small businesses.

properties.footer: سند — Daily Operations Dashboard for Lawyers and Small Businesses in Saudi Arabia

nodes.label: Smart Review Feature (المراجعة الذكية)
nodes.description: Spaced-repetition / active-recall review system for law students. Allows reviewing terms, cases, and lecture content via flashcards or quiz modes. Tracks session count, card count, accuracy percentage, and total time spent.

nodes.label: Student Morning View (صباح الطالب)
nodes.description: Top-level student portal within the Sanad app. Navigation tabs include: Study Materials (5), Academic Deadlines, Terms Bank (16), Cases Bank (6), and Smart Review. Aggregates all student-facing tools.

nodes.label: Review Session Statistics
nodes.description: Four KPI stat cards shown at top of Smart Review panel: total review sessions, number of review cards, correct answer rate (%), and total time spent in review. Gives students a snapshot of their study progress.

nodes.label: Flashcard Review Mode (بطاقات)
nodes.description: Review mode where students flip cards to reveal answers. Used for memorization of legal terms, cases, and lecture notes.

nodes.label: Quiz Review Mode (اختبار)
nodes.description: Review mode offering multiple-choice or true/false questions. Actively selected (highlighted with amber border) in the screenshot, indicating it is the default or currently chosen mode.

nodes.label: Review Source Filter
nodes.description: UI control allowing students to narrow review content by source: All (Terms + Cases + Lectures), Terms Bank only, Cases Bank only, Lectures only, a specific subject, or a specific classification. 'All' is selected by default (highlighted in green).

nodes.label: Recent Review Sessions History
nodes.description: Panel at the bottom of Smart Review showing past sessions. Each entry shows date, number of items reviewed, and accuracy score. Example entry: 'الكل', Jun 26 2023, 3 reviews, 0% score.

nodes.label: ReviewPanel.tsx
nodes.description: React component implementing the Smart Review panel shown in this screenshot. Likely manages review session stats, mode selection (flashcard/quiz), source filters, and session history display.

nodes.label: StudentView.tsx
nodes.description: Parent React component for the Student Morning view. Hosts tab navigation and renders child panels including ReviewPanel.
